title: Eva Twitter Accounts
wikitext:
[]: Eva Twitter Accounts?             Quote Post by disassembler » Thu Jun 02, 2011 10:34 am For those of you who have a Twitter and use it frequently, you may or may not already be following some Eva related Twitter accounts. Here's a few I've come across in my search: @eva_store - Obviously an important one. @GAINAXNET - Looks like a pretty official Twitter for GAINAX. I don't feel like listing them all, but here are a few more that came up in search results. Enjoy. Feel free to add any I forgot.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 02, 2011 10:37 am I hear Eva Monkey is a pretty bangin Twitter.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jun 02, 2011 12:33 pm https://twitter.com/#!/khara_inc And for this site: https://twitter.com/#!/evageeks

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jun 02, 2011 5:19 pm See also here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=11425 Megumi Ogata's twitter. (Only 1 reply in that thread?! Sheesh...) Kaji's seiyuu twitter: https://twitter.com/#!/yamachanoha

[]:             Quote Post by disassembler » Thu Jun 02, 2011 9:45 pm Ornette wrote: https://twitter.com/#!/khara_inc And for this site: https://twitter.com/#!/evageeks

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Fri Jun 03, 2011 5:06 pm *snort* And here I was thinking we'd be getting a bunch of messages composed primarily of "HAWWWRRROOOOOORRRRRR!" Because, you know. Eva Tweets. Bestial rage in 140 characters or less. *Imagines Eva-01 trying to tap out a message on a bitty little purple cellphone*

Article: Eva Twitter Accounts
[]: Eva Twitter Accounts?             Quote Post by disassembler » Thu Jun 02, 2011 10:34 am For those of you who have a Twitter and use it frequently, you may or may not already be following some Eva related Twitter accounts. Here's a few I've come across in my search: @eva_store - Obviously an important one. @GAINAXNET - Looks like a pretty official Twitter for GAINAX. I don't feel like listing them all, but here are a few more that came up in search results. Enjoy. Feel free to add any I forgot.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 02, 2011 10:37 am I hear Eva Monkey is a pretty bangin Twitter.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jun 02, 2011 12:33 pm https://twitter.com/#!/khara_inc And for this site: https://twitter.com/#!/evageeks

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jun 02, 2011 5:19 pm See also here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=11425 Megumi Ogata's twitter. (Only 1 reply in that thread?! Sheesh...) Kaji's seiyuu twitter: https://twitter.com/#!/yamachanoha

[]:             Quote Post by disassembler » Thu Jun 02, 2011 9:45 pm Ornette wrote: https://twitter.com/#!/khara_inc And for this site: https://twitter.com/#!/evageeks

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Fri Jun 03, 2011 5:06 pm *snort* And here I was thinking we'd be getting a bunch of messages composed primarily of "HAWWWRRROOOOOORRRRRR!" Because, you know. Eva Tweets. Bestial rage in 140 characters or less. *Imagines Eva-01 trying to tap out a message on a bitty little purple cellphone*
